case_title: JULIA WAN et al VS. MARK JOHN GUSTAVSON

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WAN, JULIA WAN, SUZANNE AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTAVSON, MARK JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE FILED BY PLTF.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED MAR-27-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTAVSON, MARK JOHN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-19-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY ALL PARTIES. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAN, JULIA WAN, SUZANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUSTAVSON, MARK JOHN $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,145.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS AN AWARD OF $2000.00 TO PLAINTIFF JULIA WAN AND $2000.00 TO PLAINTIFF SUZANNE WAN THE COURT ALLOCATES 75% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANT GUSTAVSON. THE JUDGEMENT IS A NEW AWARD TO THESE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
